title: Ethics, Governance, and Transparency
html:
Ethics, Governance, and Transparency

XAI
Implement Explainable AI to ensure algorithmic decisions are transparent and interpretable.
⚖️
Actively mitigate algorithmic bias and hallucinations to prevent systemic misinformation.
🌐
Establish unified global regulatory frameworks to standardize AI safety and deployment.
🛡️
Prioritize human-centric oversight to maintain accountability in autonomous systems.
